steps.title: Find the causal link
steps.content:
The first sentence describes what the South Side Community Art Center has done over decades—cultivated a community of Black creatives.

The second sentence describes what it has gained as a result: a reputation as a hub of Black art and culture.

The transition must show this cause-and-effect relationship.

steps.title: Apply the causal relationship
steps.content:
Accordingly signals that the center's reputation is a consequence of its decades of cultivating Black creatives.

The other three choices are either contrast words (on the other hand, nevertheless) that contradict this causal relationship, or a frequency marker (periodically) that establishes no logical connection.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
